title: Config panel column width NOT remembered between minimize/maximize action
author: C4rb0n
body_snippet:

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Implemented and validated fix in fork: config PropertyGrid splitter width is now remembered and reapplied after minimize/maximize layout cycles. 
Upstream PR: PR #3112 on `mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG` 
CI evidence (x86/x64/ARM64 + tests/specs): CI run 21786942297 on `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available in community release**

This fix is included in a community build from our fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). Available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and let us know if the issue is fully resolved.
